cases.prompt: High value single family residential parcels in Anacortes assessed over $750,000.
action_plan: No action needed. Keep this case in the regression suite.
cases.next_action: No action needed. Keep this case in the regression suite.
cases.generated_sql:
WITH ps AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM read_parquet('r2://openskagit/derived/parcel_search.parquet')
  WHERE lower(city_name) = 'anacortes'
    AND CAST(assessed_value AS DOUBLE) > 750000
    AND regexp_extract(COALESCE(land_use, ''), '^\((\d+)\)', 1) IN ('110', '111', '112', '113')
), imp AS (
  SELECT TRIM(ParcelNumber) AS parcel_number, string_agg(DISTINCT TRIM(imprv_det_class_cd), ' | ') AS quality_codes
  FROM read_parquet('r2://openskagit/improvements.parquet')
  WHERE TRIM(imprv_det_class_cd) = 'MSL'
  GROUP BY parcel_number
)
SELECT ps.parcel_number, ps.situs_address, ps.city_name, ps.assessed_value, ps.land_use, imp.quality_codes, 'MSL low-quality improvement class' AS match_reasons
FROM ps
JOIN imp ON ps.parcel_number = imp.parcel_number
ORDER BY ps.assessed_value DESC
cases.title: High Value Single Family Residential Parcels in Anacortes Assessed Over $750,000
cases.criteria_summary: Parcels located in Anacortes city with land use indicating single family residential, assessed value over $750,000, and having at least one improvement classified as low quality (MSL).

generation_attempts.error: Column year_built is not listed for alias ps on r2://openskagit/derived/parcel_search.parquet.
